name: Sonic IDW RPG
description:
Sonic & IDW + Archie Comic optional characters.
Initial Characters: Jewel the Beetle, Lanolin the Sheep, Tangle the Lemur, Whisper the Wolf, Shadow the Hedgehog, Rouge the Bat, E-123 Omega, Blaze the Cat, Silver the Hedgehog, Sonic the Hedgehog, Miles "Tails" Prower, Knuckles the Echidna, Amy Rose, Cream the Rabbit, Vanilla the Rabbit, Gemerl, Wisps.
Dr. Eggman, Sage, Metal Sonic, Orbot & Cubot, Dr. Starline, Surge the Tenrec, Kitsunami / Kit, Mimic the Octopus.

Lorebook triggers.

IDW: Vector the Crocodile, Espio the Chameleon, Charmy Bee, Honey the Cat, Mirage Express, Basil the Conductor & Flora, Commander Abraham Towers, Gardon the Koala, Marine the Raccoon, Clutch the Opposum, Jet the Hawk, Wave the Swallow, Storm the Albatross, Dodon Pa, Mighty the Armadillo, Ray the Flying Squirrel, Barry the Quokka, Gala the Hound, Rough & Tumble the Skunks, Shadow Android(s), Megani the Jackal, Professor Valdus, Elder Scruffy, Trip the Sungazer.
Scrapnics: Mecha Sonic, E-117 Sigma, Belle the Tinkerer, Motobud.
Diamond Cutters: Smithy the Lion, Claire Voyance, Slinger the Ocelot, Blue Block, Cyan Laser, Green Hover, Orange Rocket, Pink Spike.
Hooligans / Fang's Gang: Nack the Weasel / Fang the Sniper, Bean the Dynamite, Bark the Polar Bear. (Done)
Deadly Six: Master Zik, Zavok, Zazz, Zeena, Zomom, Zor.


Archie: Princess Sally Alicia Acorn, Breezie the Hedgehog, Bunnie Rabbot, Antoine D'Coolette, Captain Andrews, Carrotia the Rabbit, Tikal, Relic the Pika, Nicole the Holo-Lynx, Lupe the Wolf, Jian the Tiger, Doctor Ivo Robotnik (Robotnik Prime Pre-Wave) Julian Kintobor, Leeta & Lyco the wolves, Rosemary Prower
Destructix: Fiona the Fox, Scourge the Hedgehog, Drago the Wolf, Flying Frog, Lightning Lynx, Predator Hawk, Sergeant Simian, Snively Robotnik, Sleuth "Doggy" Dawg.
Egg Army: Abyss the Squid, Akhlut the Orca, Axel the Water Buffalo, Battle Lord Kukku XV, Cassia the Pronghorn, Clove the Pronghorn, Conquering Storm, Lord Mordred Hood, Maw the Thylacine, Nephthys the Vulture, Thunderbolt the Chinchilla, Tundra the Walrus.
Others?: Professor Victoria, Zooey the Vixen, Sticks the Badger, Infinite the Jackal, Cosmo, Galaxina, Lah the Ghost, Arktivus Brevon. Others (May not list if minor character.)
Underground?: Sonia, Manic, and Aleena the Hedgehogs.
Team Lilac?: Sash Lilac the Dragon, Carol Tea the Wildcat, Milla Basset the Hound.
Community?: Zeta the Echidna, Purity the Hedgehog, Dr. Eggma'am / Ivy Robotnik

Note: you don't have use the full titles. Sash Lilac, Tangle etc. for short should work just fine for some.
